title: Cybercinetics Feedback Controller
description: Typed feedback-controlled kinetic governance — ∂(→(ν, ς, ρ)). Controller tick, registry health, and batch decay for hook-binary binding loops. Pure Rust via nexcore-cybercinetics.

tools.name: controller_tick
tools.description: Run one tick of the feedback controller. Evaluates frequency decay (ν), causal chain fidelity (→), and recursion saturation (ρ) to produce a verdict: STABLE, FREQ_DECAY, FIDELITY_DEGRADED, RECURSION_SATURATED, or COMPOUND.

parameters.name: nu_floor
parameters.description: Minimum acceptable frequency before decay verdict

parameters.name: f_min
parameters.description: Minimum fidelity threshold for causal chain (default: 0.80)

parameters.name: causal_links
parameters.description: Array of {cause, effect, fidelity} objects forming the causal chain

tools.name: registry_status
tools.description: Report hook-binary binding registry health. Shows aggregate fidelity and flags degraded bindings below threshold.

parameters.name: bindings
parameters.description: Array of {hook, event, fidelity} binding objects

parameters.name: degraded_threshold
parameters.description: Fidelity threshold below which bindings are flagged (default: 0.80)

tools.name: decay_all
tools.description: Batch degrade all bindings that missed their execution window. Returns count of bindings degraded.

parameters.name: bindings
parameters.description: Array of {hook, event, fidelity} binding objects

parameters.name: floor
parameters.description: Minimum fidelity floor (bindings at or below floor are not degraded)
